Cross-Platform Support

Everywhere

Experience the full power of QuickTransfer with our native desktop applications and mobile-optimized web app.

Any Device

Why use the Desktop App?

  • Stay active in the system tray for instant code entry.
  • Receive desktop notifications when a transfer is complete.
  • Advanced multi-file compression and queuing.
